flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Arkansas Community College-Batesville rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.5k → $3.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Arkansas Community College-Batesville rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.4k → $4.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Arkansas Community College-Batesville rose 32% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.8k → $10.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Arkansas Community College-Batesville rose 258% between 2009 and 2010 (4.3% → 15.4%).
